---
title: "Kitty Wampas"
---

Kitty Wampas is a power rock trio from the Twin Cities area.

![](img/fullband.jpg)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
![6 Strings<br>Travis](img/Travis.jpg){.img-circle}
:::

::: {.column width="34%"}

![Boom Booms<br>Jake](https://helios-i.mashable.com/imagery/articles/03VF2z1a256UfelGDQvfqtU/hero-image.fill.size_1248x702.v1683668359.jpg){.img-circle}

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![4 Strings<br>John--o](img/johno.jpg){.img-circle}
:::

:::
